name: English Country House Lemon Curd
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in the top of a double boiler or an earthenware bowl placed over (but not touching) simmering water.
2. Cook, stirring until the mixture thickens and coats the back of a spoon, about 6 to 7 minutes.
3. Pour through a fine mesh strainer into a sterilized glass jar.
4. Cover tightly and refrigerate when cold (the mixture will thicken as it cools).
5. Use within 4 weeks.
Makes approximately 1 cup.
